content.title: PromptWard
content.subtitle: Review AI prompts before they leave the browser
content.brief: A dark, restrained product intro. The title fades in over a layered black background with quiet grid and glow motion. Subtle background music starts immediately, stays low, and fades out by the end.

beats.event: dark background and low audio begin
ambient rings and grid breathe in
PromptWard title fades and rises into final position
accent line and product mark settle
